issue_summary: Removed usage of non-localized error message. Changed exception type.
javadoc_before: /** * Returns the standard * error of the parameter estimate at index, * usually denoted s(bindex). * * @param index an integer index which must be in the range [0, numberOfParameters-1] * @return standard errors associated with parameters estimated at index * @throws IndexOutOfBoundsException thrown if the index >= numberOfParameters */
javadoc_after: /** * Returns the standard * error of the parameter estimate at index, * usually denoted s(bindex). * * @param index Index. * @return the standard errors associated with parameters estimated at index. * @throws OutOfRangeException if {@code index} is not in the interval * {@code [0, number of parameters)}. */
